title: YellowText
description: Makes menu text yellow when hovered, like in versions before 1.15
body:
# YellowText

YellowText does one thing, it changes the color of hovered text in buttons and sliders to yellow, like it was before 1.15. Nothing more and nothing less. Just drag it into your mod folder, it does not even need fabric api.

A backport to older versions on Fabric is currently in progress. Please contact me if you need a specific version.

I may release a forge version if/when I feel like it.
